title: poa longifolia subsp. fagetorum
intro: Poa longifolia subsp. fagetorum is a plant species that belongs to the family Poaceae and is also known as Faget's meadow grass. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, including relieving respiratory issues and reducing fever, as well as having antioxidant properties that can help protect against cell damage. Traditionally, the plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
